**Findings**

No blocking issues found.

**Acceptance Criteria**

All issue criteria are met. `GraphFinding` now stores a typed `is_config_error` field and `is_config_error()` returns that field directly at [crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs:175), [crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs:259). The config-error constructor is the only path setting it true at [crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs:532), and the transition guard reads `gf.is_config_error()` instead of scanning message text at [crates/jit/src/commands/mod.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/commands/mod.rs:755).

`ReportedFinding.severity`, `RuleOutcome.scope`, and `RuleOutcome.severity` are typed as `Severity`/`Scope` at [crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs:40) and [crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs:190). `is_error()` and `ExplainReport::has_errors()` use enum comparisons at [crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs:92) and [crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs:278).

JSON compatibility is covered by serialization tests at [crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs:296), [crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs:324), and [crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs:345). `Severity` and `Scope` serialize with `rename_all = "snake_case"` at [crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:149) and [crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:206).

**Architecture And Separation Of Concerns**

No boundary violations found. The changes stay in validation value/domain logic and command orchestration. No storage/file I/O was added to `domain/` or validation graph/report code, and CLI rendering remains in `main.rs`, using `.token()` for human output at [crates/jit/src/main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/main.rs:4540).

**Functional Paradigm**

No blocking functional-style debt found. The changed production paths use small value transformations and iterator pipelines; the only local mutation reviewed is command-layer accumulation of blocking/warning messages at [crates/jit/src/commands/mod.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/commands/mod.rs:745), which is acceptable orchestration code.

**Correctness And Invariants**

No correctness regression found. The control path no longer classifies config errors by `message.starts_with(CONFIG_ERROR_PREFIX)`; the only remaining such check is a unit-test sanity assertion at [crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs:3974). Atomic writes, event logging, gate semantics, assignee/label formats, and PID safety are not affected by this change.

**Safety**

No unsafe code introduced. Workspace crates still enforce `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` in `crates/jit/src/lib.rs`, `crates/jit/src/main.rs`, and server crate roots.

**Testing**

Per instruction, I did not run cargo tests because the issue has succeeded `cargo-ci` evidence. Recorded gate `.jit/gate-runs/111284e4-a15e-42ac-a686-bfcee4cf6825/result.json` passed for commit `7849c0c9e490b38897e0c837a3ced63f452f9652`: fmt ok, clippy ok, `2695 passed, 0 failed, 12 ignored`.

I did run `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed.

**Error Handling**

No new fallible production code paths or non-test `unwrap()`/`expect()` issues found in the reviewed changes.

**CLI Contract**

No new command was added. Existing JSON output remains structured through serde; human output was adjusted to render typed `Scope`/`Severity` via `.token()` at [crates/jit/src/main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/main.rs:4543).

**Documentation**

Public changed APIs have doc comments and examples: `GraphFinding` constructors/accessor at [crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs:126), report types at [crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/report.rs:16), and enum token methods at [crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-99908d7b/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:161).

**Prior Review Feedback**

`run_history` is empty, so there are no prior findings to verify.

**Jit Issue Management**

The issue has no dependencies. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed, and the required `cargo-ci` gate is recorded as passed. `code-review` is this review.

VERDICT: PASS
